auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your wardrobe.
auth.signupSubtitle: Create an account to get started.

outfit.title: Outfit generator
outfit.subtitle: Pick occasion and weather, then build a look from your wardrobe.
outfit.emptyWardrobe: Let's add a few clothes first — your future outfits depend on it 👗
outfit.recentlyGeneratedHint: Tap a look to open it again with the same occasion and weather.
outfit.emptySuggestion1: Pick an occasion and weather, then tap Generate — we’ll build a look from your closet.
outfit.emptySuggestion2: Add tops, bottoms, dresses, and shoes so the matcher has more to work with.
outfit.emptySuggestion3: Try Stylist mode for three curated directions in one go.
outfit.emptyHint: Choose options above and tap generate to see a suggested outfit.
outfit.dressReplacesBottom: No separate bottom — your top is a dress.
outfit.stylistHint: Curated for your closet — tweak with a new roll anytime.

rationale.title: Why this works
rationale.lead: Built for {{occasion}} in {{weather}} weather: pieces align on mood and practicality.
rationale.top: The {{typeLabel}} in {{color}} with a {{style}} feel sets the tone and silhouette.
rationale.bottom: The bottom in {{color}} ({{style}}) balances the palette without competing.
rationale.dressFlow: A dress carries the full look — clean lines, one-and-done elegance.
rationale.footwear: {{color}} footwear ({{style}}) finishes the outfit and keeps the palette cohesive.
rationale.balance: Colors and styles are chosen to read intentional from head to toe.

outfit.feedbackPrompt: Help your stylist learn — how does this look feel?
outfit.shareFailed: Could not create the image. If photos are from another site, try again after they load.
outfit.shareSavedInstead: Sharing isn’t available here — your image was downloaded instead.

savedOutfits.title: Saved outfits
savedOutfits.subtitle: Outfits you bookmarked from the generator.
savedOutfits.empty: No saved outfits yet. Generate a look and tap Save outfit.

clothes.uploadSubtitle: Add a piece using an image URL (file uploads can come later).
clothes.empty: No clothes yet. Upload your first piece.

errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Users, analytics, and system controls.
admin.previewSubtitle: Runs generation against your admin wardrobe using current ML settings (not counted in analytics).
admin.chartGenerationsHint: Last 30 days (UTC). Counts from production generations only.
admin.chartLikeRateHint: Share of likes among feedback submitted each day (last 30 days, UTC).

toasts.outfitLiked: Love it — we’ll lean into this vibe next time.
toasts.outfitDisliked: Thanks — we’ll steer away from similar mixes.
